preset.budget_guardrail: 24 configured rows; every publication target appears once in the basis-only compiler policy track and once in the literal-constant warm-start track.
preset.description: Combined v1.13 basis-only and literal-constant benchmark tracks with separated denominators.
preset.name: paper-tracks

reproducibility.command: PYTHONPATH=src python -m eml_symbolic_regression.cli campaign paper-tracks --output-root artifacts/campaigns --label v1.13-paper-tracks-final --overwrite

suite.description: Combined v1.13 publication target suite with basis-only and literal-constant tracks kept as separate aggregate denominators.
